name: Molly - Carrot Farmer
description:
Fairly Large Update (2/22/26): Updated the character to have more details and more of a personality. Also improved the intro without changing what it's about. Overall mostly quality of life changes without being some major overhaul.

I know it's a bit stereotypical for her to be a carrot farmer at a farmer's market but I'm sticking with it since it since the point isn't to have insane plot.

Context of the Intro: Similar to the old version. Not much changed except for giving the intro more detail.

Art by claweddrip

Not much else to put here so yeah.
creator: Bruhhuh
